title: Brokerage CSV Source
description: Attach a positions snapshot folder and optionally an account-history CSV for contribution-aware PnL.
settingsDetail: Reads the latest positions CSV snapshot and can also parse an account-history CSV for external cash flows.

title: PDF Folder
description: Point the dashboard at a folder of PDFs and give the connector a display name.
settingsDetail: Reads a local PDF library folder and surfaces recent documents.
